description: Hydropathy profiles and structural topology comparison of Ca_LPL1, Sc_LPL1, and Sc_ROG1 showing shared membrane topology between LPL1 orthologs
code:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import requests

headers = {"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0", "Accept": "application/json"}

def fetch_seq(acc):
    url = f"https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/{acc}.fasta"
    resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=30)
    lines = resp.text.strip().split('\n')
    return ''.join(lines[1:])

ca_lpl1 = fetch_seq('Q5AMS2')
sc_lpl1 = fetch_seq('Q08448')

# Kyte-Doolittle hydropathy scale
kd_scale = {
    'A': 1.8, 'R': -4.5, 'N': -3.5, 'D': -3.5, 'C': 2.5,
    'Q': -3.5, 'E': -3.5, 'G': -0.4, 'H': -3.2, 'I': 4.5,
    'L': 3.8, 'K': -3.9, 'M': 1.9, 'F': 2.8, 'P': -1.6,
    'S': -0.8, 'T': -0.7, 'W': -0.9, 'Y': -1.3, 'V': 4.2
}

def hydropathy_profile(seq, window=15):
    """Calculate Kyte-Doolittle hydropathy profile"""
    values = [kd_scale.get(aa, 0) for aa in seq]
    profile = []
    for i in range(len(values) - window + 1):
        avg = np.mean(values[i:i+window])
        profile.append(avg)
    return profile

# Calculate profiles
ca_profile = hydropathy_profile(ca_lpl1, window=15)
sc_profile = hydropathy_profile(sc_lpl1, window=15)

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(14, 12))
fig.suptitle('LPL1 Hydropathy and Structural Analysis', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Panel 1: Ca_LPL1 hydropathy
ax1 = axes[0]
positions_ca = np.arange(8, 8 + len(ca_profile))  # center of window
ax1.plot(positions_ca, ca_profile, 'b-', lw=1, label='Ca_LPL1 (Q5AMS2)')
ax1.axhline(y=1.6, color='red', ls='--', alpha=0.5, label='TM threshold (1.6)')
ax1.axhline(y=0, color='gray', ls='-', alpha=0.3)

# Mark DUF676 domain
ax1.axvspan(14, 213, alpha=0.1, color='blue', label='DUF676 domain')
# Mark TM region
ax1.axvspan(286, 306, alpha=0.3, color='yellow', label='TM helix (UniProt)')
# Mark catalytic Ser
ax1.axvline(x=104, color='red', ls=':', alpha=0.7, label='Cat. Ser (S104)')

ax1.set_ylabel('Hydropathy (KD)')
ax1.set_title('A. Ca_LPL1 (Q5AMS2) - 556 aa', fontweight='bold')
ax1.legend(fontsize=8, loc='upper right')
ax1.set_xlim(0, 560)

# Panel 2: Sc_LPL1 hydropathy
ax2 = axes[1]
positions_sc = np.arange(8, 8 + len(sc_profile))
ax2.plot(positions_sc, sc_profile, 'g-', lw=1, label='Sc_LPL1 (Q08448)')
ax2.axhline(y=1.6, color='red', ls='--', alpha=0.5, label='TM threshold (1.6)')
ax2.axhline(y=0, color='gray', ls='-', alpha=0.3)

# Mark TM region
ax2.axvspan(269, 289, alpha=0.3, color='yellow', label='TM helix (UniProt)')
# Mark catalytic Ser
ax2.axvline(x=90, color='red', ls=':', alpha=0.7, label='Cat. Ser (S90)')

ax2.set_ylabel('Hydropathy (KD)')
ax2.set_title('B. Sc_LPL1 (Q08448) - 450 aa', fontweight='bold')
ax2.legend(fontsize=8, loc='upper right')
ax2.set_xlim(0, 560)

# Panel 3: Structural topology comparison
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.set_xlim(0, 700)
ax3.set_ylim(-1, 5)
ax3.set_title('C. Structural Topology Comparison', fontweight='bold')
ax3.set_xlabel('Residue position')

# Ca_LPL1
y_ca = 3.5
ax3.barh(y_ca, 556, height=0.6, color='#ccddff', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax3.barh(y_ca, 199, left=14, height=0.6, color='#6699ff', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax3.barh(y_ca, 20, left=286, height=0.6, color='#ffcc00', edgecolor='orange', linewidth=1.5)
ax3.plot(104, y_ca, '*', color='red', markersize=12, zorder=5)
ax3.text(-5, y_ca, 'Ca_LPL1', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax3.text(113, y_ca+0.45, 'DUF676', fontsize=8, ha='center', fontweight='bold')
ax3.text(296, y_ca+0.45, 'TM', fontsize=7, ha='center', color='orange')
ax3.text(400, y_ca, 'C-terminal\n(Ser/Thr-rich)', fontsize=7, ha='center', va='center', fontstyle='italic')

# Sc_LPL1
y_sc = 2
ax3.barh(y_sc, 450, height=0.6, color='#ccffcc', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax3.barh(y_sc, 199, left=1, height=0.6, color='#66cc66', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax3.barh(y_sc, 20, left=269, height=0.6, color='#ffcc00', edgecolor='orange', linewidth=1.5)
ax3.plot(90, y_sc, '*', color='red', markersize=12, zorder=5)
ax3.text(-5, y_sc, 'Sc_LPL1', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax3.text(100, y_sc+0.45, 'DUF676', fontsize=8, ha='center', fontweight='bold')
ax3.text(279, y_sc+0.45, 'TM', fontsize=7, ha='center', color='orange')

# Sc_ROG1
y_rog = 0.5
ax3.barh(y_rog, 685, height=0.6, color='#ffdddd', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax3.barh(y_rog, 200, left=234, height=0.6, color='#ff9999', edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax3.plot(269, y_rog, '*', color='red', markersize=12, zorder=5)
ax3.text(-5, y_rog, 'Sc_ROG1', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax3.text(334, y_rog+0.45, 'DUF676', fontsize=8, ha='center', fontweight='bold')
ax3.text(550, y_rog, 'No TM\n(cytosol/nucleus)', fontsize=7, ha='center', va='center', fontstyle='italic')

# Legend
ax3.plot([], [], '*', color='red', markersize=10, label='Catalytic Ser (GXSXG)')
ax3.plot([], [], 's', color='#ffcc00', markersize=8, label='TM helix')
ax3.legend(fontsize=8, loc='upper right')

ax3.set_yticks([])

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('hydropathy_topology.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved")
